channel.title: Ales - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

image.title: Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!

channel.itunes:summary: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

itunes:owner.itunes:name: Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!

item.title: BridgePort Brewing Company: Summer Squeeze, Ep. 169
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In the heat of the summer, there’s nothing like a cold beer! Even better, there’s nothing like a cold American craft beer!! This week on Beer America TV we’re talking about BridgePort Brewing’s Summer Squeeze . Brewed with Lemon grass and Yuzu, this “Bright Ale” is clean, crisp and leaves you with a bit of […]

The post BridgePort Brewing Company: Summer Squeeze, Ep. 169 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Mother’s Brewing Company: Towhead, Ep. 168
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
At Beer America TV, we’re fortunate to have friends in the brewing community that send us beers, this week is the first of several sent by Mothers Brewing Company! Towhead is an easy drinking American Blonde (tow head…get it?) with a very sessionable 5.2% ABV . This beer is great for the veteran American craft beer […]

The post Mother’s Brewing Company: Towhead, Ep. 168 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Dogfish Head: Squall IPA, Ep. 160
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week Beer America TV tackles yet one more beer from Dogfish Head. Squall IPA is basically a 100% bottle conditioned version of their 90 Minute IPA thats dry hopped . Another excellent IPA which is by no means a surprise coming from Dogfish! The good news is, this beer should cellar well, the bad […]

The post Dogfish Head: Squall IPA, Ep. 160 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Oskar Blues: Gordon Goes to Vietnam, Ep. 157
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
While in Vietnam, Beer America TV had the perfect opportunity to pay tribute to Gordon Knight. For those of you who don’t know, Oskar Blues brews a brilliant beer called G’Knight . This beer was inspired buy their good friend and fellow brewer Gordon Knight, who was also a Vietnam Veteran and helicopter pilot. Unfortunately, […]

The post Oskar Blues: Gordon Goes to Vietnam, Ep. 157 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Ska Brewing Company: Pinstripe Red Ale, Ep. 152
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we continue our goofy green screen series with Ska Brewing Company’s Pinstripe Red Ale. This one is another great example of how Ska is separating themselves from the pack by brewing bold beers that are unique in flavor for their category! Pinstripe Red is brewed with caramel malts and […]

The post Ska Brewing Company: Pinstripe Red Ale, Ep. 152 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Harpoon Brewery: Summer Ale – Ep. 150
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
OK, we at Beer America TV know that Summer is officially over, but you can still find many summer brews on the store shelves and if not, then put this one in your cue for next year. We’re talking Harpoon Summer Ale from Harpoon Brewery in Boston MA. This is a Kölsch-style ale that is […]

The post Harpoon Brewery: Summer Ale – Ep. 150 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Bear Republic Brewing: Racer 5 IPA, Ep. 134
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
IPA’s come in many different forms, some bitter, some almost sweet. This week on Beer America TV, we’re talking about Racer 5 from Bear Republic Brewing, which does an excellent job balancing both . This 4-time GABF medal winner is another great example of what a quality IPA should taste like! Now why in the […]

The post Bear Republic Brewing: Racer 5 IPA, Ep. 134 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Lagunitas: Little Sumpin’ Wild Ale, Ep. 133
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Most people like a Little Sumpin’, so this week on Beer America TV, we’re giving you a Little Sumpin’ Wild! Described as the big sister of A Little Sumpin’ Sumpin’ Ale, this Belgian Style Strong Pale Ale from the Lagunitas Brewing Company is truly a step up in taste and style . It has a […]

The post Lagunitas: Little Sumpin’ Wild Ale, Ep. 133 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
